“实在找不到工作你就回来吧！”
大学毕业后，找不到工作的陆渊接受父母的建议，回到农村。
父母给了他一片山，让他自己发展。
于是陆渊便在这片山上养起了猪，准备成为养猪大户，然后走上自己的人生巅峰。
但就在这时系统觉醒，他成了御兽宗宗主，要他担负起将御兽宗发扬光大的伟大使命。
“不是，我一个养猪的？御兽宗宗主，没搞错？”
......
至此之后各种动物纷纷找上门，而且来的全是一些他惹不起的祖宗。
金雕、金丝猴、渡鸦、老虎、象群.....
“自己这是养猪场，不是动物园啊。”
陆渊一边哭诉，一边将自己的御兽宗做大做强。
等等，谁能告诉我天上那条龙是什么情况！！！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0bbb9f0d9d732168e498e140819c42b8","author":"西瓜鱼子酱","author_id":"","book_id":"7567585249777962009","book_name":"直播养猪，我成御兽大宗主了！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#283840","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7567589890385248793","read_count":"10231","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"595084"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"5.8","serial_count":"276","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,直播,多女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d449ecfb2f51d8e252c78093625ebad6~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779398637&x-signature=iK8LBU8Dg4TABLlAorjaLkDufys%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3518045515686302","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"19"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230523570DA9D31F5AB035294DE1"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4193,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2430},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":fa
